summary: Tested all features from iteration 4: 1) Landing page minimal design - PASSED, 2) Login page minimal design - PASSED, 3) Doctor dashboard clickable stat cards and quick actions - PASSED, 4) Staff dashboard clickable stat cards and quick actions - PASSED, 5) Admin dashboard View Weekly Schedule quick action - PASSED, 6) Sidebar Schedule link for admin/doctor/staff - PASSED. All navigation tests verified with actual clicks.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review: Dashboard.js correctly implements clickable stat cards with Link wrappers for all roles
Code review: LandingPage.js and LoginPage.js are now minimal with just logo, title, subtitle, and Google sign-in button
Code review: Sidebar.js includes Schedule link for admin, doctor, and staff roles correctly
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (doctor-stat-0/1/2, staff-stat-0/1/2, view-schedule-btn, etc.)

success_rate.backend: N/A - focused on frontend UI testing

seed_data_creation: Created test users and sessions: admin session test_session_1771863587630, doctor session test_doctor_session_1771863645057, staff session test_staff_session_1771863645100
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard navigation features tested and working: 1) Landing page at '/' shows only Vedanth Clinic name, subtitle, Google sign-in - verified minimal design; 2) Login page at '/login' same minimal design - verified; 3) Doctor dashboard stat cards clickable: Today's Appointments -> /schedule, My Patients -> /patients, Total Appointments -> /appointments - all verified with actual clicks; 4) Doctor Quick Actions: View Weekly Schedule, My Appointments, My Patients, Medical Records - all visible; 5) Staff dashboard stat cards clickable: Today's Appointments -> /schedule, Pending Check-ins -> /appointments, Pending Invoices -> /invoices - all verified; 6) Staff Quick Actions: Book New Appointment, View Weekly Schedule, Today's Schedule, Patients, Billing & Invoices - all visible; 7) Admin dashboard has View Weekly Schedule quick action - verified; 8) Sidebar shows Schedule link for admin, doctor, staff roles - verified in all screenshots. Test sessions created for admin, doctor, staff users.
